$comment: Merge-blocking floors per model. minPassK stays 0 until the first real live run; it ratchets UP from that run's measured pass^k (never hand-set). maxSilentCorruptions is hard-zero for every model. minTasks is the required task coverage (the v0 suite is 12). k is the number of trials per task the floor is defined at. No performance number here is a claimed result.
